title: thelypteris loheriana
intro: Thelypteris loheriana, also known as the Loher's fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is a perennial plant native to the Philippines, known for its medicinal properties and various health benefits. The plant contains saponins, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The leaves of the Thelypteris loheriana plant are traditionally used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat fever, rheumatism, and other health conditions.
